name: Chat Spike
description: Chat message velocity exceeds 3x baseline over 10s window (Twitch/livestream).

name: Viewer Count Spike
description: Concurrent viewer count rises > 20% in under 60 seconds.

name: Audio Spike
description: Audio RMS jumps > 2x baseline within a 3-second window.

name: Emotion Spike
description: Strong emotional shift detected via sentiment or pitch analysis.

name: Keyword Cluster
description: High density of virality-signal keywords within 30s window.

name: Manual Marker
description: Explicitly flagged by creator or editor as a clip moment.

name: Audience Clip
description: Moment that has already been clipped and shared by audience members.

name: Silence Break
description: Sudden end of silence followed by energetic speech or sound.

name: Topic Shift
description: Semantic analysis detects a clear change in topic or narrative.
